sml_convergence.description: Single diagnostic trial objective history at 20 dB

algorithm: Grid-MUSIC with Root-MUSIC/ESPRIT/DML/SML baselines and stochastic CRB

additional_params.resolution_success_rule: exactly two dominant peaks, each within +/-2 deg of its nearest true DoA
additional_params.threshold_gap_rule: threshold region flagged when RMSE exceeds 3x stochastic CRB

performance_targets.theoretical_bound: Stochastic CRB for two-source ULA DoA estimation; optional WWB-informed interpretation for low-SNR threshold behavior

constraints.complexity: offline_simulation_feasible; eigendecomposition-based methods preferred over heavy iterative solvers for primary sweep

raw_results.algorithm: Grid-MUSIC with Root-MUSIC/ESPRIT/DML/SML baselines and stochastic CRB

sml_convergence.description: Single diagnostic trial objective history at 20 dB

report_assets.problem_summary: Two-source DoA estimation for 8-element half-wavelength ULA, L=200 snapshots, SNR sweep 0:2:30 dB.
report_assets.solution_summary: MUSIC pseudo-spectrum localization benchmarked against Root-MUSIC, ESPRIT, DML, SML, and stochastic CRB with Monte Carlo averaging.
report_assets.evaluation_summary: Includes RMSE-vs-SNR, resolution probability-vs-SNR, CRB ratio, threshold masks, runtime, pseudo-spectrum diagnostics, and snapshot sensitivity.
